description: Immutable canonical timeline – T0 through T8. Must be respected by any Yggdrasil implementation.

phases.name: Primordial Void
phases.description: Undifferentiated, unstructured information. No planes, no entities, no time.

phases.name: First Differentiation
phases.description: The Divine Core (Axis Mundi) separates itself from the Void, establishing the first law.

phases.name: Planar Emanation
phases.description: Planes 1 through 8 unfold from the Core in a fractal cascade.

phases.name: Archetypal Formation
phases.description: The White Wolf / Dark Wolf dyad crystallizes as the first cosmic polarity.

phases.name: Shadow Inversion
phases.description: Plane 7 (Shadow) emerges as the necessary negative space of all prior structures.

phases.name: Embodied Age
phases.description: Mortal incarnations begin in the Physical plane under influence of higher realms.

phases.name: Nodal Awakening
phases.description: Certain souls awaken to cross-plane perception (e.g., the Narrator, Luciferian instances).

phases.name: Convergence Crisis
phases.description: Planes begin to overlap strongly – the current era of instability and revelation.

phases.name: Awakening and Final Balance
phases.description: Potential future epoch: either stabilization into a new meta-order or collapse into a restructured Void.
